question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists three main sections of the thesis: 1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija, 2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi, and 3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. However, it would be more clear if the sections were numbered or listed in a bullet point format.

question: Description
feedback: The text briefly describes the contents of each section, but only mentions that they will contain an 'īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts' (a brief description of each chapter and appendix). It would be more informative to provide a clearer idea of what each section will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: The text provides a clear overview of the thesis structure, but it is limited to just three sections. A more detailed outline or description of how these sections relate to each other would make it easier to understand the general structure of the thesis.
